checks.description: Clean first-run reset shows both providers missing/not connected without exposing credential values.

evidence.note: Checklist contains clean first-run reset coverage, exact storage identifiers, and no-credential pass criteria.

checks.notes: Live confirmation requires quitting the app and deleting scoped UserDefaults and Keychain items, which was intentionally not performed under the non-destructive task constraint.

checks.description: Claude-only configured state keeps ChatGPT missing/not connected and does not remove Claude credentials during ChatGPT retry/clear.

evidence.note: Provider workflow tests passed for provider-specific copy, shared provider status rendering, and action surfaces.
Security invariant tests passed for scoped provider clearing and no credential disclosure.

checks.description: ChatGPT-only configured state keeps Claude missing/not connected and does not remove ChatGPT credentials during Claude retry/clear.

evidence.note: Provider workflow tests passed for provider-specific copy, shared provider status rendering, and action surfaces.

checks.description: Both providers configured show distinct settings/menu usage states with provider-scoped loading, refresh, error, retry, clear, and reconnect behavior.

evidence.note: ProviderErrorWorkflowTests passed for shared status rendering and safe action surfaces.
Provider status surface and workflow copy audits exited 0 with advisory-only ChatGPT copy review findings.

checks.description: Expired ChatGPT session reports sanitized invalid/expired state, preserves Claude state, persists sanitized diagnostic status, and reconnects cleanly.

evidence.note: No-credential persistence/error tests passed for settings and diagnostics surfaces.
Workflow copy audit exited 0 with advisory-only findings.

checks.notes: Automated sanitized diagnostic checks passed; forcing or using an expired live ChatGPT session requires a human-safe app-supported path.

checks.description: Provider clear and reconnect removes/restores only the selected provider credential and updates settings/menu states without full reset.

evidence.note: Scoped provider clearing tests passed and verified repository-boundary resets without broad Keychain deletes.
Provider workflow tests passed for safe repair/clear actions without manual credential fields.

checks.notes: Automated scoped-clear evidence passed; live clear/reconnect requires deliberate credential mutation and was left for human follow-up.

presentation.notes: Non-destructive UAT execution only; no UserDefaults or Keychain reset commands were run. Source inspection and artifact editing were performed outside the run-uat tool presentation surface.

notes: Partial UAT verdict: all non-destructive automated evidence passed, while destructive reset, live browser import, expired-session, and clear/reconnect workflows remain documented human follow-up items.
